# notion-templates — LICENSE & SOURCING NOTE

**Scrape date:** 2026-04-21
**Operator:** Regan Cooney (regacooney@gmail.com)

## Contents

- `recreated/` — 10 HTML approximations of Notion template information-architecture (page hero + emoji + callout + cols + database table + gallery view + checklist + toggle list). These mirror the structural grammar of the Notion page layout; they are NOT Notion page exports.
- `metadata.json` — slug, title, designer (where named), description.
- `INDEX.md` — top-ranked picks for Clawmachine-fit.

## Why no `previews/` directory

Notion template listings are primarily information-architecture schemas, not visual web UI. Rendering a meaningful preview screenshot would require authenticating into Notion and duplicating the template — out of scope for this scrape. The value of a Notion template is the database schema and linked-page structure, which we have captured at the IA level in the recreated HTML.

## Licence posture

Every recreated HTML is an original authored approximation of a public Notion template page. No Notion page content has been duplicated. The page grammar (callout blocks, colored tags, toggle lists, column views) is the generic Notion block vocabulary — not copyrightable in itself.

To use any of these templates: visit `notion.so/templates/<slug>` and duplicate to your workspace.

## Fair-use basis

UK fair-dealing for non-commercial research. Operator is the sole viewer. Named designers credited in `metadata.json` and in a visible footer on each HTML recreation. On request from any named designer, the corresponding recreation will be removed.
